title: Vitax Olive Tree Feed, Suitable For Borders, Pots & Containers, Encourages Healthy Growth: 0.9Kg Pouch
features: CAN BE USED ON TREES BOTH YOUNG TO OLD, POTTED OR PLANTED OUT: This Vitax Olive Tree Feed is suitable for all stages of olive tree growth, whether they are newly planted saplings or mature trees, and can be applied to both potted and in-ground trees.
PROVIDES EXTENDED NITROGEN RELEASE: Delivers a slow and steady supply of nitrogen, ensuring continuous nourishment that promotes lush, green foliage and robust growth over time.
BOOSTS FRUITING: Enhances the tree's ability to produce more fruit, leading to larger, more abundant harvests of healthy olives.
CONTAINS ADDED MAGNESIUM AND TRACE ELEMENTS: Enriched with essential minerals that support overall plant health, improve nutrient uptake, and enhance the resilience of olive trees.
ORGANIC-BASED FOR HEALTHIER PLANTS: Formulated with organic nutrients that promote sustainable growth and improve soil health, contributing to a thriving and eco-friendly garden environment.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Use protective gloves and eyewear during application. Wash hands thoroughly after use. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid ingestion and direct contact with skin or eyes. If swallowed or exposed to eyes, seek medical advice immediately and show the container or label.
